'''Harbid''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the resurgence of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Harbid commanded the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Death's Head]]'' approximately [[9 ABY/Legends|five years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
As commanding officer of the ''Death's Head'', Captain Harbid was part of Grand Admiral Thrawn's personal armada, and was believed to have been one of the first of Thrawn's commanders to be alerted of any operations or plans concerning the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] or the starfleet, making it quite possible that he was a captain of some seniority. He participated in an unsuccessful operation to capture [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the [[Palanhi system/Legends|Palanhi system]], as well as in a more successful [[Battle of Ord Pardron|assault]] on a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] base at [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]], as part of Thrawn's plan to [[Battle at Ukio|capture]] the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]]. Harbid also accepted the surrender of [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]] after a lengthy [[Battle of Xa Fel (9 ABY)|battle]] in which he managed the deployment of Thrawn's ground forces.<ref name="CSWE" />

Like most members of Thrawn's armada, his last known participation in combat operations was at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].
